notes: Works smoothly, though the game crashed a few times during the last level. Cinematics don't play, but that seems to be the case on Windows too. Unfortunately, I couldn't get the Windows fixes to work so I just watched the cinematics on Youtube. Game is short enough for it.
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II

notes: At this point I havent tried to use Wine but the steam version with proton 3.16-9 the game shows blurrieness on the bottom and shadows are messed up also runs my gpu a little on the toasty side for an old game 80c with gsync set to 144hz .
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II

notes: It works out of the box. However, every time it starts it attempts to install .Net and there's a little bit of pixelation here and there.
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II

notes: Out of the box this game crashes during cut-scenes (whenever the game shows something else on the map) but runs fine with minor graphical issues when not in a cut-scene.
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II

notes: The cut scenes are missing. Also there is some graphics glitches (Small boxes around the main player and the bottom 1/10 of the screen is displaying many pixels of boxes.) There is also some slowdown. Besides that the game runs ok.
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II

notes: Seems to work okay, but there's a bar of pixelation at the bottom of the screen at all times.
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II

notes: The game works out of the box, but with WineD3D it crashed quite fast. I installed D9VK and it worked much better with this DX9 to Vulkan translation, without this it would be bronze.
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II

notes: Game still has cut scene and graphics glitches (seems to be less.) D9VK does not work and causes the game to crash.
title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ II
